title: Onboarding - Continue as guest
scenario: Onboarding flow differs between Android and iOS after tapping 'Continue as guest' — iOS shows additional location permission and passcode prompts before reaching home screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. On the onboarding screen, tap 'Continue as guest'.
3. When prompted, select either 'Allow' or 'Don't Allow' for the displayed permission.
4. Observe the Poly Product Improvement Program popup that appears.
5. Dismiss the popup and observe the final screen.
expected: After tapping 'Continue as guest' and selecting Allow/Don't Allow, the Poly Product Improvement Program popup appears, then the user is directed to the Home screen.
